description: Repos with discovered latent value, promoted into the ranked build-out tier.

repos.thesis: Framework-agnostic cipher engine (Caesar/Atbash/Vigenère/Enigma state machines + pluggable visual-metaphor renderers) atop a deterministic generative substrate (@meta-source/utils: seeded PRNG, golden-ratio math, numerology). Reusable for cryptography education, CTF tooling, and generative-art seeding; foundation for Phase-5 on-chain pulse().
repos.first_task: Extract the cipher engine into a headless @meta-source/cipher-engine workspace package with vitest coverage.
